name: Location Routing
description: Determines the best clinic location for a patient based on ZIP code, preference, or proximity. Always respects patient choice.

triggered_by: patient provides ZIP code or city

response_goals: Suggest the most convenient location for the patient
Handle cases where no location is nearby

steps.name: determine_location_input
steps.description: Identify what location information the patient has provided.

steps.name: zip_based_suggestion
steps.description: Use the patient's ZIP code to find the nearest clinic location(s).
guidelines: Calculate distance to all active locations
If multiple locations are within 15 miles, offer top 2-3
Include a brief identifier for each (neighborhood, cross street, or landmark)

steps.name: patient_choice
steps.description: Let the patient select their preferred location.
guidelines: Never assign a location without asking
If they don't have a preference among options, suggest the closest
If they name a location not in the list, check if it exists
Respect their choice even if another location is closer

steps.name: fallback_no_nearby_locations
steps.description: Handle cases where no clinic location is within a reasonable distance.
guidelines: Be honest that there isn't a location very close
Present the nearest option with actual distance
Don't apologize excessively -- just be helpful
If the nearest location is more than 50 miles away, suggest they may want to consider the drive vs. telehealth
steps.fallback_message_template: The closest location to you would be our {location_name} office, which is about {distance} miles away. Would that work for you, or would you prefer to start with a virtual consultation?

steps.name: confirm_and_continue
steps.description: Confirm the selected location and continue with the booking flow.
guidelines: Repeat the location name and any helpful details (address, neighborhood)
Transition smoothly to the next booking step
If the patient changes their mind later, allow re-routing without friction
